Alter EgoAbout

Alter Ego is a free, 60-second mirror. Answer five quick questions and meet your archetype: a coined name, a vivid metaphor, your real strengths, an honest shadow, and a short reading that actually sounds like you. Enter your email and two more cards are yours: your Friend Group Ego, who you are to the people around you, and your Shadow Ego, the person you almost were. Share any card with a tap, or drop your bio straight into your profile. Free forever, no account, just you.
